author: y4rr
content: Pass 2B APPROVE (clean). 11 production CPU-pull sites migrated to on-device primitives in ViT (7 sites) + Swin (4 sites). Net -75 lines (manual loops replaced with primitives). vit_b_16_value_parity + swin_t_value_parity both green; vision 757 PASS / 0 fail (was 756, +1 autograd-preservation test for cls_token grad through ExpandBackward → CatBackward). Linear handles 3-D natively (V1 batched MLP unrolling eliminated). Sabotage demo: PatchMerging permute axis swap caught at element 0 with diff 2.078e-1 (80× tolerance). 3 deferred sites correctly justified: relative_position_bias gather (#1014), one-time mask construction (not hot-path), #[cfg(test)] helpers. No new deps, no public API change.
